ItacPersonItem.Notes: A letter addressed to Pietro Aretino, where Sansovino explains his interest in joining the Infiammati Academy, is published in Lettere scritte a Pietro Aretino, ed. Paolo Procaccioli (Roma: Salerno editrice, 2003-04), pp. 304-05
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
